name: Artemis Castle
lore: There is no lore, There is just a pain and waste of time. This building is curse for me. it took a lot of resource and still not finish. I tryna finish this place for 2 weeks. And try to challenge with building limit [5000 pieces] in this game, and I can do it. This place is taking more than 20k pieces rn. so it looks high and huge =w=
whatToVisit: Every detail in this place because ITS BIG...

name: My humble sand castle
lore: My first thought upon entering Hexi desert was that i want a huge castle here, so i built it
whatToVisit: There is a garden in the center of the castle, two main towers, throne room, bedroom, reading hall aka dining room, and cute halls.

name: First Home under Maple tree
lore: When people get tired, the first thing they think of is home. This was the first building I ever made in this game. Even though it looks incomplete, it’s full of memories for me. It represents the smiles, the inspiration, and the passion that my boyfriend and I put into this place.
whatToVisit: Climb up and face the view >w0

name: Waterfall Village
lore: There is no lore, This is just a normal village.
whatToVisit: Every building within this place because I add a lot of detail in it >w0

name: My house Inn
lore: this the very first project ive ever made, I hope yall like it ^_^

name: Cozy waterfall home with a view on ruins
lore: There is no certain lore. At first I just started to build home near waterfall and then after I finished the main building I wanted to have a view on smth with green-fantasy vibe. My first project in solo mode and cuz of that it filled with imperfections. Still in work tho.
whatToVisit:
The main house 
A place for the rest near waterfall under the tree
The ruins itself 
A small kitchen

name: Meow Meow Hotspring.
lore:
A great location with a natural hot spring. 
Perfect for dealing with Liangzhou’s cold. 
There are a lot of cats here too!
whatToVisit: A natural hot spring with a view of snowy mountains and red flowers and of course, cats.

name: Luxury Boat
lore: For my 2nd project I really wanted to make my own boat but I got carried away and made this thing, I hope yall like it

name: My mansion!
lore: No Lore. I just wanted to build here because it's always dark
whatToVisit:
-Everywhere
-Inside the mansion, Rooms are fairly empty tho.
-Tea/Reading spot at the left back.
-Bathtub next to it
-Workshop on the right back corner
-Dojo on the right side of the mansion
-On the roof a little dancing stage and more.

name: Autumn Dusk Dwelling School
lore: Floating on the river is a boarding school for those who want to sharpen their crafts, upon giving Tea to your new Shizun you will have access to all that the school has to offer, Lecture Hall, Potions/Alchemy, Herbology and Art classrooms, a sparring area to work those muscles to give the mind a break. the kitchens are well stocked and connected to a large dining hall ready for all occasions, the 3 level dormitories have many bedding options and a leisure and study area on the roof and rest those aching bones in the outdoor baths after the day is done.... or maybe climb the stairs and ready yourselves for your trails.   (im Terribly Slack at posting my own stuff)

name: Lianghzhou Glimmerword Sky Build
lore: A build that started as something simple on the frozen lake at the Glimmerwood Boundary stone that turned into a multi-level project that took roughly a week and a half to build and decorate.

name: My first house
lore:
Hi all, may i present to you JY Onsen Villa. Took me more than week to complete it. This is the first actual house that i build as previously my lakeside house is a diagram from a friend and I just added the bridge and martial training hall next to it. My journey started 3 weeks ago and I am still a beginner and I am learning from the mistake and errors.  It has flaws but i am learning and strive to improve. I spend a lot of times aligning, modifying, correcting, decorating, discarding and correcting, decorating the items. I get some ideas and inspiration from friends works and thanks to them I learned and gave me new ideas to progress.

I am also available for hire if you are interest to have some builds in your world map. My UID is 4042165548 can dm or in game. Thank you and hope my video can inspire some of you to start building. Have a great day ya.  Video link is here : https://drive.google.com/file/d/1P1SKCfqbA94ly74zuJYXhpOG3WXeNUNS/view?usp=drive_link
